title: What is a File?
drDigitalIntro: A file is anything you save on your laptop — a photo, a document, a video, a song. Every file has a name and lives somewhere on your computer. When you take a photo with your phone or write a document, you're creating a file. Let me show you what files look like.

playgroundTask.question: Which of these is a file?

options.text: A photo you saved on your Mac

drDigitalSuccess: Exactly right! A saved photo is a file. Folders hold files, apps run programs, and the wallpaper is a display setting.
drDigitalHint: Think about what you've actually saved to your computer — that thing sitting there with a name and a location is a file.
